data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for localized/help text per mode.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Localized/help text per mode,' but the evidence provided does not directly address this requirement. While there are multiple successful steps in the saga lifecycle, none of them confirm the existence or functionality of the required localized/help text. This leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary evidence is lacking.
gaps: No evidence of localized/help text per mode.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
